overview.text: PulsePatch is a reusable wearable for desk workers. It detects sustained upper-back posture, delivers directional haptic cues for a 30-second reset movement, and records completed sessions locally. A washable textile carrier, removable electronics pod, and no-camera sensing distinguish it from screen reminders and camera-based trackers.

design-innovation.text: Most posture reminders stop at an alert, which users can dismiss without knowing what to do next. PulsePatch pairs posture sensing with directional haptics that immediately guide a short corrective movement. Its removable sensing pod also separates long-life electronics from the washable, replaceable textile carrier. Together, these decisions turn a passive notification into an actionable private intervention while improving serviceability.

benefit-user.text: Desk workers receive a specific movement cue without opening an app, leaving the current task, or enabling a camera. The discreet on-body interaction supports short posture resets during ordinary computer work.

benefit-client-brand.text: The modular architecture gives the client a serviceable wearable platform rather than a sealed product. Replaceable textile parts can address wear and fit while retaining the electronics pod, creating a concrete point of differentiation for the brand.

benefit-society.text: PulsePatch brings preventive movement guidance into routine desk work without recording video of users or workplaces. Separating the washable carrier from the longer-life electronics also avoids replacing the entire product when the textile component wears out.

appropriate-aesthetics.text: The low-profile pod follows the upper back and remains visually quiet under clothing. A neutral grey seamless knit softens the technical object, while silicone contact pads provide a gentle skin interface. Matte recycled polycarbonate supports the restrained appearance and protects the reusable electronics module.

physical-dimensions.text: Electronics pod: 72 × 38 × 9 mm; textile carrier: 180 × 95 mm
